params._comment: A stable resonant low-pass in Q2.13 (coeff_frac = 16-3). Real values: b ~= [0.0061, 0.0122, 0.0061], a1 ~= -1.709, a2 ~= 0.793. a1 < -1 exercises the supra-unity feedback coefficient a plain q15 lane number cannot hold. Pre-quantized integers (like gain_q/pan_lq) so no transcendental enters the bit-exact comparison.
